full_text:
Zhang Te (Zichan) 張特 (子產)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Te (張特), styledZichan (子產). Commanded the defence of Xincheng when it was under attack by Zhuge Ke. Zhang Te was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
